name: Spring Green Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 3-3/1 c packed, cooked brown rice or other cooked whole grain
3 teaspoons Tamari soy sauce (up to 4 teaspoons) or miso
1 teaspoon Liquid sweetener (up to 2 teaspoons) to balance flavors
A few dashes of Cayenne pepper and Sea kelp for seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the green onions and celery until tender.
2. In a large frying pan, sauté the green onion in oil for 1-2 minutes.
3. Add all the seasonings and sauté another minute.
4. Transfer the mixture to a blender and blend twice until fairly smooth, resulting in a lovely green light green soup.
5. Simmer everything on medium heat for 15-25 minutes until the onions are tender and the flavors have melded together.
6. Serve hot with bread, crackers, or other accompaniments. Keeps refrigerated for up to 3-6 days.
